details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all core requirements. The PixelArt provider is properly added under packages/pixelart with complete structure (package.json, tsconfig, tsup config, tests). The createPixelArt factory function is exported and creates a PixelArtProvider object with image() methods. PixelArtImageModel implements ImageModelV3 with doGenerate() (correct for AI SDK v3, not generateImage). Image settings fully support size, style enum ['pixel', 'retro', '8bit'], and pixelDensity. Base URL correctly set to 'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1'. Package follows existing AI SDK provider patterns with proper error handling, exports, and comprehensive tests. Only minor issue: tsconfig.json was modified to add the new package reference (necessary monorepo integration), though rubric specifies only new files should be created. This is a standard monorepo practice and doesn't modify provider package files themselves.
